caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a large, silver, conical wig and a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a red patterned bow tie and tan suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, wearing black headphones and speaking into a professional microphone. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a mannequin torso draped with clothing, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. A logo on the left side of the screen displays a microphone icon with the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," while text on the right says "BOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera and background remain static.
